description: A recruiter is sourcing passive candidates for a hard-to-fill 'Cybersecurity Architect' role using LinkedIn Recruiter.

nodes.task_description: Build a Boolean search string to identify candidates with the required skills and experience.

expected_outcome.value: Recruiter creates an effective search string (e.g., '"cybersecurity architect" AND (AWS OR Azure) AND CISSP').

nodes.task_description: Execute the search on a professional networking site and review the profiles of the top results.

expected_outcome.value: Recruiter identifies a list of 20 promising candidates.

nodes.task_description: Send personalized outreach messages to the top candidates.

expected_outcome.value: Recruiter sends InMail messages to the candidates, introducing the role and company.
